property_issue_summary: The review identified 3 consolidated observation(s) across Hall, Parking. The main reported issue types are crack, dampness, leakage. Thermal findings were treated as supporting evidence only.

evidence: Observed dampness at the skirting level
Observed mild dampness at the ceiling of
Supporting thermal reference attached from thermal report.
observations.probable_root_cause: Probable moisture ingress or prolonged water exposure near the affected surface.
observations.severity_reasoning: Severity marked medium because the issue may worsen if untreated but available evidence is not critical.
recommended_actions: Inspect adjacent plumbing, waterproofing, and exterior exposure points.
Carry out moisture measurement and open-up inspection before repair.

evidence: Observed cracks on the External wall of building
observations.probable_root_cause: Probable movement, shrinkage, or localized structural stress.
observations.severity_reasoning: Severity marked medium because the issue may worsen if untreated but available evidence is not critical.
recommended_actions: Assess crack width, pattern, and recurrence.
Refer to a structural engineer if cracks are progressive or wide.

evidence: Observed leakage at the Parking ceiling
Supporting thermal reference attached from thermal report.
observations.probable_root_cause: Probable active or historical leakage from plumbing joints, wet areas, or exterior envelope.
observations.severity_reasoning: Severity marked medium because the issue may worsen if untreated but available evidence is not critical.
recommended_actions: Trace the leakage source through targeted plumbing and waterproofing checks.
Rectify the source before cosmetic restoration.
